nasb.text: Then Moses went out to meet his father-in-law, and he bowed down and kissed him; and they asked each other of their welfare and went into the tent.

esv.text: Moses went out to meet his father-in-law and bowed down and kissed him. And they asked each other of their welfare and went into the tent.

cnv.text: 摩西出來迎接他的岳父，向他下拜，與他親吻，彼此問候，然後一起進了帳棚。

ccb.text: 摩西出去迎接岳父，向他下拜，与他亲吻，彼此问安，然后大家都进了帐篷。
